prompt: Add a call to GAPBondMgr_FindAddr as the first check inside OAD_open in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/profiles/oad/cc26xx/oad.c — so OAD rejects image transfers from unbonded devices before doing any setup.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
Preflight call graph section flags a call-order or initialization hazard — GAPBondMgr_FindAddr has a dependency on the bond manager being initialized before OAD_open is invoked
